# Public commands promised by the Milestone 1.1 CLI contract.
start
status
setup --default-channel ops --daemon-url http://127.0.0.1:25295 --discord-token-stdin
send --channel ops --message "hello"
emit hermes.agent.started --payload '{"session_id":"demo"}'
explain hermes.agent.started --payload '{"session_id":"demo"}'
config show
config path
config verify
hermes hook --provider gateway --payload '{"event":"agent:start"}'
hermes install-hooks --scope global --force
hermes uninstall-hooks --home /tmp/hermeship-test-home --dry-run
git commit --repo hermeship --branch main --commit 1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678 --summary "ship git source" --channel ops --repo-path /tmp/hermeship --worktree-path /tmp/hermeship-worktree
git branch-changed --repo hermeship --old-branch main --new-branch codex/milestone-8-git --channel ops --repo-path /tmp/hermeship --worktree-path /tmp/hermeship-worktree
install --dry-run
uninstall --remove-config --remove-state --remove-hooks --hermes-home /tmp/hermeship-test-home --dry-run
release preflight 0.1.0
